seoTitle: Tennant Creek vs Thamarrurr — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tennant Creek and Thamarrurr. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tennant Creek vs Thamarrurr: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tennant Creek and Thamarrurr.
heading: Tennant Creek vs Thamarrurr — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tennant Creek, Northern Territory and Thamarrurr, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tennant Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Thamarrurr (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tennant Creek or Thamarrurr safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tennant Creek has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Thamarrurr scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tennant Creek scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Thamarrurr scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tennant Creek or Thamarrurr?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tennant Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
